evidence_quotes.quote: video games disappearing over the past 15 years.
Games where I played a lot and bought digital products (skins, virtual money, etc.) simply closed their servers and I no longer had access to the content.
without allowing any means of obtaining reimbursement or access to the content.

paragraphs.text: Hello, Thank you to have opened this public inquiry. I have been passionate about video games for a long time, and I have been able to see many video games disappearing over the past 15 years. Games where I played a lot and bought digital products (skins, virtual money, etc.) simply closed their servers and I no longer had access to the content purchased. There are many examples to mention, I would only make some references: — XDefier of Ubisoft: the sunset publisher (server closure procedure) 3 years after leaving the game, without allowing any means of obtaining reimbursement or access to the content. — Ubisoft Ghost Recon Online: older, but even history. — Ghost in the Shell: Alone Complex First Assault Online stand by Nexon: the song is the same... There is a website featuring all these games that have disappeared, and players have bought digital items. What I ask you, as an EU citizen and as a player, is to better protect us from these immoral practices of video game publishers. I have also signed the petition ‘Stop Killing Games’, the values of this movement are those I want to share here: allow us to continue to have access to the content, regardless of whether we have paid for services/content in games. Thank you very much for what you do.
